name: Test
display_title: chore(deps): bump spring-security.version from 6.5.4 to 7.0.4 in /dhis-2

head_commit.message:
chore(deps): bump spring-security.version from 6.5.4 to 7.0.4 in /dhis-2

Bumps `spring-security.version` from 6.5.4 to 7.0.4.
